title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Select Device link
scenario: When no device is connected, tapping "Select Device" shows a list of supported devices with images and an "Other devices" button that opens the Poly support web page.
steps: Observe the list of supported devices with images.
Scroll to the bottom of the list.
Observe the web page that opens.
expected: A list of supported devices with images is displayed. Tapping the "Other devices" button opens the Poly support web page.
